title: Israeli Strikes Kill 10 in Gaza, Including Toddler
detail: Israeli airstrikes on Gaza resulted in 10 fatalities, including a toddler, according to reports from Gaza health officials. The strikes represent a continuation of military operations in the territory amid ongoing tensions.

media.caption: Report on Israeli strikes in Gaza that killed 10 people including a toddler

title: Report Alleges Israel Engineering Starvation Policy in Gaza
detail: New report claims Israel is systematically engineering a starvation policy in Gaza while international attention focuses on Iran tensions. The allegations come amid ongoing concerns about humanitarian access and food security in the besieged territory.

media.caption: Gaza residents face severe food shortages amid ongoing conflict

title: Israel Launches Deadly Strikes in Lebanon Despite Diplomatic Efforts
detail: Israel conducted fatal airstrikes in Lebanon despite ongoing diplomatic initiatives aimed at de-escalation. The strikes have sparked anger in Lebanon and raised questions about the effectiveness of current diplomatic channels.

media.caption: Aftermath of Israeli strikes in Lebanon amid diplomatic tensions
